title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 100.740 - Financing agreement, authority to enter into
text:
100.740.  Financing agreement, authority to enter into. — The board may enter into, with the approval of the department and in consultation with the office of administration, with any eligible industry, a financing agreement with respect to its economic development project.  Subject to the inclusion of the mandatory provisions set forth in sections 100.700 to 100.850, the terms and provisions of each financing agreement shall be determined by negotiations between the board and the eligible industry.
(L. 1996 H.B. 1237 § 11)
